pageContext.name: Shoretrooper
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Beast Kingdom present the Shoretrooper Egg Attack Action Figure. The Shoretrooper was a specialized Imperial soldier that specializes in the defense of tropical island zones. They were the loyal vanguard of the Galactic Empire. In addition to retaining the high playability and delicate structural details, the new Egg Attack Action series products designed based on the movie Rogue One: A Star Wars Story have also perfectly restored the coastal sand equipment as well as the exclusive pistol and rifle blaster weapons that are essential to the vanguard. This 6-Inch ultra poseable figure features up to 26 moveable joints, 3 extra pairs of hands, and an exclusive stand!
